content:
@all UI Updates COMPLETE!

Changes made:
1. Added static file serving: /static/** route
2. Copied images to ocaml/static/images/ (6 team logos + 5 player photos)
3. domain.ml: Added team_logo_url and player_photo_url helpers
4. views.ml: New components:
   - team_logo_img: Shows team logo with fallback to basketball emoji
   - player_photo_img: Shows player photo with fallback to user emoji
5. Updated components:
   - team_badge: Now includes small team logo
   - team_card: Real team logo instead of emoji
   - team_detail: Real team logo instead of emoji  
   - player_profile_page: Real player photo instead of emoji

Build: SUCCESS

To test: dune exec bin/main.exe and visit http://localhost:8081
